issues.description: Missing core mechanics: effect does not implement the 'look at 5 cards' step, the reveal condition, the selective add-to-hand (up to 1 {Donquixote Pirates}), or the bottom-deck placement of remaining cards. Current DSL only searches deck without these constraints.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to {Donquixote Pirates} type cards (up to 1 card revealed and added).
Missing action to place remaining 4 cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL has only SearchDeck; needs additional logic for deck reordering.

actions.notes: Remaining 4 cards returned to bottom of deck in any order
